courseTitle: Game Feel, UI, Audio, and Visual Communication
title: Suitcase Submarine
genericDescription: Integrate UI into the game world; reduce HUD dependency; communicate health, score, or objectives through objects and environment.
specificDescription: A tiny submarine where oxygen is shown by cabin bubbles and treasure progress by suitcase stickers mounted in the vessel itself.
gradingRubric: 30 pts diegetic UI clarity; 20 pts world integration; 20 pts gameplay completeness; 15 pts visual hierarchy; 15 pts playtest evidence.
